name: Chocolate Crinkles
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix oil, chocolate and granulated sugar in a bowl until well combined.
2. Add 1 egg at a time to the mixture, stirring after each addition until smooth.
3. Stir in vanilla extract.
4. Gradually fold in flour, baking powder, and salt until just incorporated.
5. Chill the dough several hours or overnight.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Drop teaspoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
8. Roll each mounded portion in confectioners' sugar.
9. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the cookies are set and have no indentation when lightly touched in the center.
10. Makes approximately 6 dozen cookies.
